chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3538 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.15606/2022 (Exemption) 2. For hearing of main case 07.8.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. It was last taken up on 07.6.2022, which is over three years ago. In the last three years, learned counsel for the petitioners has made no efforts to have this matter fixed for urgent hearing. Today, despite lapse of three years, learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
